---
id: get-current-1
title: "Get current API key info"
description: "Returns info the API key which user currently authenticated with. Otherwise responds with 400 status code."
sidebar_label: "Get current API key info"
hide_title: true

api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get current API key info"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/api-keys/current"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns info the API key which user currently authenticated with. Otherwise responds with 400 status code.
